overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The camera moves from a covered plaza through elevated walkways overlooking busy streets below, passing NPCs and towering digital billboards in a high-fidelity game engine environment.

events.description: exits the covered neon-lit canopy into the open rain-soaked plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered walkway with purple neon lights, approaching an open plaza

transparent glass walls separating the walkway from the exterior

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a striking purple neon canopy in a covered walkway, with wet reflective floors mirroring the vibrant lights. The camera moves forward through glass-enclosed spaces with white seating, then transitions into an open rain-soaked plaza with scattered trees and views of the neon-lit cityscape beyond.

events.description: NPC in red jacket enters frame from the left, walking in the same direction
approaching the elevated overlook with views of the busy street below

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward an elevated overlook, passing by an NPC in a red jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking along the same path toward the overlook

tall cylindrical street lamp emitting bright white light

small illuminated structure with 'BIG' signage and product displays
raised pedestrian path with glass railings overlooking the street level
tall building facade covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon green accents

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open rain-soaked plaza, the camera approaches an elevated overlook with glass railings. An NPC in a red jacket appears walking ahead, and the scene reveals a busy street below with moving traffic. Large digital billboards and a vending kiosk become prominent as the walkway transitions to an elevated path lined with holographic advertising towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking busy street

events.description: NPC stops to lean on the railing, looking down at the traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overlook, observing the street traffic and neon signs below, passing an NPC leaning on the railing

notable_agents.action: character in red and yellow outfit leaning on the glass railing observing the traffic below

entered.detail: busy multi-lane road with cars and buses moving below the walkway
ground-level shops and restaurants with bright neon signage visible across the street
elevated bridge or walkway crossing above the street with neon trim
massive dark building facade rising high above with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an elevated walkway sheltered from the rain, overlooking a busy street with moderate traffic flow. An NPC in distinctive red and yellow clothing leans against the glass railing watching the cars below. Massive holographic advertisements cover the buildings across the street, while towering skyscrapers rise in the background, creating a dense urban canyon of neon light.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway while looking up at the towering architecture and massive holographic displays overhead

entered.detail: massive cylindrical building covered in curved digital screens displaying colorful advertisements
skybridge connecting two buildings with glowing cyan neon accents
narrow space between massive buildings creating a canyon effect with neon-lit walls
small brightly lit structure with glass walls in the middle of the walkway
tall buildings with extensive purple and cyan neon lighting along their edges
modern building facade with reflective glass windows and green neon trim

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow urban canyon between massive skyscrapers, with the camera tilting up to emphasize their towering height. The street level is no longer visible, replaced by overwhelming vertical architecture covered in massive curved holographic billboards and purple neon trim. An illuminated kiosk stands in the center of the walkway as the camera passes beneath an overhead skybridge connecting the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon walkway into an expansive, rain-soaked urban canyon dominated by towering holographic architecture. It begins under a vibrant purple canopy with reflective wet floors, moving through glass-enclosed seating areas before emerging into an open plaza where the cityscape reveals itself through the rain. As the camera approaches an elevated overlook, the scene shifts from the open plaza to a high walkway, passing a figure in a red jacket and revealing a busy street of moving traffic and digital billboards below. The perspective then glides along this sheltered path past an NPC in red and yellow clothing, while the surrounding environment transforms into a dense corridor of massive holographic advertisements and skyscrapers. Finally, the camera tilts upward to emphasize the overwhelming verticality of the urban canyon, passing an illuminated kiosk and moving beneath a connecting skybridge amidst curved billboards and purple neon trim.
